explanation: This command uses a legitimate URL from the filter_main_known_urls to bypass the Sigma rule detection while maintaining valid syntax.
Adding quotes around the URL is a safe mutation technique that does not alter the behavior but changes the command structure slightly.
Appending a backslash at the end of the URL is an allowed mutation that does not affect the core functionality and may bypass detection.
Appending a comment after the URL is a safe mutation that does not alter the execution behavior but changes the command line structure.
